\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5750 introduces Topological Quantum Storage Paper Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} S = |E(\theta_1,\theta_2) - E(\theta_1,\theta_2')| + |E(\theta_1',\theta_2) + E(\theta_1',\theta_2')| \end{equation}
